vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on Backup passwd File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/passwd-, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/passwd-

triage_decision.reason: Changing the mode of the backup passwd file is a simple file permission adjustment that does not affect active authentication mechanisms or system boot. The fix is well‑known, low‑impact, and unlikely to cause lockout or service disruption.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Incorrect permission could expose sensitive data if set too permissive; If the command is mistyped, permissions may remain non‑compliant
